title: Java Programming TA
description: Support labs, answer student questions, and help grade assignments.
requirements: Solid Java fundamentals and good communication skills.

title: Data Structures TA
description: Guide weekly labs and assist with algorithm exercises.
requirements: Knowledge of data structures and algorithm basics.

title: AI Fundamentals TA
description: Support ML assignments and project checkpoints.
requirements: Basic machine learning understanding and Python experience.

title: Database Systems TA
description: Help students with SQL practice and database design tasks.
requirements: Good SQL skills and ER modeling knowledge.

title: Web Development TA
description: Assist with frontend and backend lab sessions.
requirements: Experience with HTML/CSS/JavaScript and basic backend concepts.

title: Academic Writing Workshop TA
description: Support workshop logistics and student writing practice.

title: Student Orientation Assistant
description: Help run orientation events and answer newcomer questions.
requirements: Friendly attitude and event coordination ability.
